dashboard.label: Fintech — Business Observability
dashboard.description: Transfer & Pay workflow: business KPIs mapped to technical signals | OCP Apps

panel.html:
⚡ AI INCIDENT BRIEF — AUTO-GENERATED 14:35 IST ACTIVE INCIDENT
79%
Transfer Success Rate
SLA: 99%
₹50.2L
Revenue At Risk
Last 15 min
5
Impacted Customers
HNI: 2 | Corp: 2
2,756ms
Auth P99 Latency
SLA: 1,000ms
Root Cause: auth-service P99 latency crossed 2,756ms (SLA: 1,000ms) — pod auth-service-5c6d7e under memory pressure.
Blast Radius: HYD region primary (3 failures), MUM + BLR + DEL secondary. HNI & Corporate tiers most affected.
Recommendation: Rollback auth-service to v2.2.9. Scale auth pod replicas from 2 → 4. ETA to recovery: ~4 min.

search.query: index=ocp_fintech sourcetype=ocp_fintech_logs app=payment-api endpoint=/api/v1/transfer customer_tier=$customer_tier_filter$ region=$region_filter$ | eval is_success=if(status_code="200", 1, 0) | stats avg(is_success)*100 as success_rate | eval success_rate=round(success_rate, 1)

index=ocp_fintech sourcetype=ocp_fintech_logs app=payment-api status_code!=200 customer_tier=$customer_tier_filter$ region=$region_filter$ earliest=-15m | stats sum(eval(tonumber(amount))) as rev | eval display="₹" + tostring(round(rev/100000, 1)) + "L"
index=ocp_fintech sourcetype=ocp_fintech_logs status_code!=200 customer_tier=$customer_tier_filter$ region=$region_filter$ earliest=-15m | stats dc(user_id) as impacted
index=ocp_fintech sourcetype=ocp_fintech_logs app=auth-service | stats p99(duration_ms) as p99_latency | eval p99_latency=round(p99_latency, 0) + "ms"

index=ocp_fintech sourcetype=ocp_fintech_logs customer_tier=$customer_tier_filter$ region=$region_filter$ | eval breached=if(tonumber(duration_ms) > case(customer_tier="HNI",1000,customer_tier="Corporate",1500,true(),2000),1,0) | stats sum(breached) as sla_breaches

index=ocp_fintech sourcetype=ocp_fintech_logs app=payment-api endpoint=/api/v1/transfer customer_tier=$customer_tier_filter$ region=$region_filter$ | eval is_success=if(status_code="200", 1, 0) | timechart span=5m avg(is_success)*100 as "Success Rate (%)"
index=ocp_fintech sourcetype=ocp_fintech_logs app=auth-service | timechart span=2m p99(duration_ms) as "P99 Latency" p95(duration_ms) as "P95 Latency" avg(duration_ms) as "Avg Latency"

panel.title: Failure by Workflow Step (Where in funnel?)

search.query: index=ocp_fintech sourcetype=ocp_fintech_logs status_code!=200 customer_tier=$customer_tier_filter$ region=$region_filter$ | stats count as failures dc(user_id) as users sum(eval(tonumber(amount))) as revenue by workflow_step | eval revenue_L=round(revenue/100000,1) | sort -failures

panel.title: Blast Radius by Region (₹ At Risk)

search.query: index=ocp_fintech sourcetype=ocp_fintech_logs status_code!=200 customer_tier=$customer_tier_filter$ region=$region_filter$ | stats dc(user_id) as customers sum(eval(tonumber(amount))) as revenue by region | eval revenue_L=round(revenue/100000,1) | sort -revenue

index=ocp_fintech sourcetype=ocp_fintech_logs status_code!=200 customer_tier=$customer_tier_filter$ region=$region_filter$ | stats count as errors dc(user_id) as users avg(duration_ms) as avg_ms sum(eval(tonumber(amount))) as revenue by app, error_type | eval avg_ms=round(avg_ms,0) | eval revenue="₹" + tostring(round(revenue/100000,1)) + "L" | sort -errors | rename app as "Service" error_type as "Error Type" errors as "Error Count" users as "Users Affected" avg_ms as "Avg Latency (ms)" revenue as "Revenue At Risk"

panel.title: Revenue At Risk by Customer Tier

search.query: index=ocp_fintech sourcetype=ocp_fintech_logs status_code!=200 region=$region_filter$ | stats sum(eval(tonumber(amount))) as revenue dc(user_id) as customers count as errors by customer_tier | eval revenue_L=round(revenue/100000,1) | sort -revenue

index=ocp_fintech sourcetype=ocp_fintech_logs region=$region_filter$ | eval sla_ms=case(customer_tier="HNI",1000,customer_tier="Corporate",1500,true(),2000) | eval breached=if(tonumber(duration_ms) > sla_ms, 1, 0) | stats count as total sum(breached) as breaches by customer_tier, app | eval breach_rate=round(breaches/total*100,1) + "%" | sort -breaches | rename customer_tier as "Tier" app as "Service" total as "Total Requests" breaches as "SLA Breaches" breach_rate as "Breach Rate"

index=ocp_fintech sourcetype=ocp_fintech_logs app=payment-api endpoint=/api/v1/transfer customer_tier=$customer_tier_filter$ region=$region_filter$ | eval Status=if(status_code="200", "✅ SUCCESS", "❌ FAILED") | eval Amount="₹" + tostring(amount) | table _time, correlation_id, user_id, customer_tier, Amount, region, Status, duration_ms | sort -_time | head 15 | rename _time as "Time" correlation_id as "TXN ID" user_id as "User" customer_tier as "Tier" region as "Region" duration_ms as "Latency (ms)"
